name: Pollo Loco Marinade III
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the squeezed lemon and lime juices with the cilantro in a bowl.
2. Mix in the orange juice and Mexican spice seasoning until well combined.
3. Pour the marinade over raw chicken pieces and let soak for up to 4 hours.
4. Before grilling, you can add tequila for an extra flavor boost.
5. Grill the marinated chicken on the BBQ until fully cooked through.
